<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.12 -->

# core

Core programmatic API barrel (`index.ts`) and logger abstraction (`logger.ts`) for agents-reverse-engineer engine — exports all reusable modules (AI, discovery, generation, orchestration, quality, change detection, config, imports) with `@beta` stability and zero forced console output for library consumers.

## Contents

- **[index.ts](./index.ts)** — Barrel export grouping nullLogger/consoleLogger/Logger, AIService/AIProvider/AIBackend/SubprocessProvider, discoverFiles/walkDirectory/applyFilters, buildFilePrompt/buildDirectoryPrompt/detectLanguage, writeSumFile/readSumFile/writeAgentsMd/writeAgentsMdHub/writeClaudeMdPointer, DocumentationOrchestrator/buildExecutionPlan/runPool, extractExports/checkCodeVsDoc/checkCodeVsCode/checkPhantomPaths/buildInconsistencyReport, computeContentHash/isGitRepo/getChangedFiles, loadConfig/findProjectRoot/getDefaultBackendConfig/getDefaultModelForBackend/Config, extractImports/extractDirectoryImports/formatImportMap for CLI-independent usage
- **[logger.ts](./logger.ts)** — Logger interface (debug/warn/error methods), nullLogger (no-op default), consoleLogger (stderr-based using console.error for all levels) — core modules accept optional Logger param, default to nullLogger for zero output unless consumers inject consoleLogger or custom implementation

## API Surface

**Import specifier**: `'agents-reverse-engineer/core'` (package.json exports entry).

**Exported modules** (stable identifiers for external consumers):
- **Logger**: `nullLogger`, `consoleLogger`, `Logger`
- **AI**: `AIService`, `AIServiceOptions`, `AIProvider`, `AICallOptions`, `AIResponse`, `AIBackend`, `RetryOptions`, `AIServiceErrorCode`, `AIServiceError`, `withRetry`, `DEFAULT_RETRY_OPTIONS`, `SubprocessProvider`, `SubprocessProviderOptions` (from `../ai/`)
- **Discovery**: `discoverFiles`, `walkDirectory`, `applyFilters`, `FileFilter`, `FilterResult`, `WalkerOptions` (from `../discovery/`)
- **Generation Prompts**: `buildFilePrompt`, `buildDirectoryPrompt`, `detectLanguage`, `PromptContext` (from `../generation/prompts/`)
- **Generation Writers**: `writeSumFile`, `readSumFile`, `getSumPath`, `sumFileExists`, `getAnnexPath`, `writeAnnexFile`, `SumFileContent`, `writeAgentsMd`, `writeAgentsMdHub`, `isGeneratedAgentsMd`, `writeClaudeMdPointer` (from `../generation/writers/`)
- **Orchestration**: `DocumentationOrchestrator` (aliases: `GenerationOrchestrator`, `UpdateOrchestrator`), `GenerationPlan`, `PreparedFile`, `AnalysisTask`, `UpdatePlan`, `buildExecutionPlan`, `formatExecutionPlanAsMarkdown`, `ExecutionPlan`, `ExecutionTask`, `runPool`, `PoolOptions`, `TaskResult` (from `../orchestration/`)
- **Quality**: `extractExports`, `checkCodeVsDoc`, `checkCodeVsCode`, `checkPhantomPaths`, `buildInconsistencyReport`, `formatReportForCli`, `formatReportAsMarkdown`, `Inconsistency`, `InconsistencyReport`, `InconsistencySeverity`, `CodeDocInconsistency`, `CodeCodeInconsistency`, `PhantomPathInconsistency` (from `../quality/`)
- **Change Detection**: `computeContentHash`, `computeContentHashFromString`, `isGitRepo`, `getCurrentCommit`, `getChangedFiles`, `FileChange`, `ChangeDetectionResult` (from `../change-detection/`)
- **Config**: `loadConfig`, `findProjectRoot`, `getDefaultBackendConfig`, `getDefaultModelForBackend`, `ConfigSchema`, `Config`, `getDefaultConcurrency`, `DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS`, `DEFAULT_VENDOR_DIRS` (from `../config/`)
- **Imports**: `extractImports`, `extractDirectoryImports`, `formatImportMap` (from `../imports/`)

## Integration Pattern

Core modules accept optional `Logger` parameter — defaults to `nullLogger` for library consumers; CLI commands inject `consoleLogger` to restore existing stderr output behavior; custom consumers may provide domain-specific logger implementations compliant with Logger interface.

## API Stability

`@beta` annotation until v1.0.0 — external consumers must anticipate breaking changes across minor versions; import via `'agents-reverse-engineer/core'` for programmatic usage (no `process.exit`, `ora`, `picocolors` dependencies).
